context: ◊  NO predisposing factors in 25%! √  typically unilateral @   Femoral head: 4-6 months after fracture (in 10-15%), in 30-40% of nonunions of scaphoid fracture Site:   proximal fragment (most common) @   humeral head (infrequent) @   talus (after talar neck fracture) √  bilateral (in 70-80%) (a)  Occlusion / embolization of artery
